sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114661" key="xrhsmodo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρησμοδότ-ης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who gives oracles, prophet, soothsayer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:112:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
